entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of natural resources in dry regions to support livelihoods and ecosystems

entities.name: DRY REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by low rainfall and fragile ecosystems

entities.name: FRAGILE ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Ecosystems in dry regions that are sensitive to environmental pressure

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The primary occupation of people in dry regions and the basis for natural resource management

entities.name: WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A management approach that traditionally emphasized soil and water conservation

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Conservation measures used in conventional watershed management

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT MODEL
entities.description: A holistic approach to natural resource management incorporating multiple strategic components

entities.name: FARMER-PARTICIPATORY APPROACH
entities.description: A component of the integrated watershed management model involving active farmer participation

entities.name: SCIENCE TOOLS
entities.description: New scientific tools used within the integrated watershed management model

entities.name: IGNRM STRATEGY
entities.description: Integrated genetic and natural resource management strategy providing site-specific solutions

entities.name: CONSORTIUM APPROACH
entities.description: A multi-institutional approach for technical backstopping, knowledge exchange, and research linking

entities.name: MONITORING AND EVALUATION
entities.description: Continuous assessment process conducted by stakeholders to ensure effectiveness

entities.name: COMMUNITY AND WOMEN EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The social goal of empowering community members and women within the management model

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION
entities.description: The goal of protecting the environment through integrated management

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of land quality, which is reduced by the consortium strategy

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The economic and social well-being of rural populations, improved through increased incomes

relationships.description: integrates genetic and natural resource management
